title: rorippa × terrestris
intro: Rorippa × terrestris, also known as watercress mustard or land cress, is a hybrid plant belonging to the family Brassicaceae, resulting from the cross between Rorippa nasturtium-aquaticum and Brassica juncea. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to cool the body and clear heat. The health benefits of Rorippa × terrestris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Rorippa × terrestris can be prepared into various herbal products, including tea, tincture, and capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and safety profile.
